arts.ttl: Mattia Zaccagni Reveals Special Rapport With Juventus Icon: “He Messaged Me After My Goal”
arts.sum: Lazio captain Mattia Zaccagni discussed his special relationship with legendary Juventus striker Alessandro Del Piero. The 29-year-old was interviewed by The Laziali Founder & TLN TV Serie A Host Steven Moore. The winger weighed in on several topics, including his rapport with the iconic Bianconeri captain who has always been his idol.
